# Starlight Communities

Use this repo to build agentic community systems around small weekly creation
cells.

Core files:

- `src/schemas.ts`: canonical object schemas.
- `src/run-sheet.ts`: weekly run-sheet generation.
- `src/matching.ts`: 3-5 person cell matching.
- `src/gates.ts`: safety and human-approval classifier.
- `modules/starlight-communities.module.yaml`: agent-readable module manifest.
- `skills/*/SKILL.md`: agent skills.
- `openclaw/`: OpenClaw-style SOUL templates and registry.
- `hermes/`: Hermes-style swarm contracts.

Rules:

- Do not use private member data in examples.
- Do not send or publish without approval.
- Treat platforms as adapters, not canonical stores.
